items.title: SpaceX stock has cooled. Hiring for jobs in the space economy hasn't
items.title_zh: SpaceX股价下跌，招聘未增职位
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：Clearly, there's money to be made in space.；SpaceX's historic initial public offering minted a $2 trillion company.；And even as shares in Elon Musk's company come down from their IPO high, there remains an underlying boom in the space economy that is creating a new job market for Americans.
important_points: Clearly, there's money to be made in space.
SpaceX's historic initial public offering minted a $2 trillion company.
And even as shares in Elon Musk's company come down from their IPO high, there remains an underlying boom in the space economy that is creating a new job market for Americans.

items.title: Nvidia: 3 Key Threats Are Gaining Momentum And Visibility (NASDAQ:NVDA)
items.title_zh: Nvidia面临三大威胁，市场关注度上升
items.summary: 近期分析显示，Nvidia的股价下跌至192美元，市场对其低估值持怀疑态度。尽管收入同比增长85%且数据中心需求强劲，但竞争加剧使其数据中心GPU地位受威胁。分析师指出，客户转向自主AI芯片可能削弱其市场优势。公司未披露持有相关股票，保持中立立场。
important_points: 股价持续下跌至192美元
客户转向竞争对手加大压力
数据中心市场竞争加剧
分析师发布披露，强调风险

items.title: ‘Heated Rivalry’ fuels a boom in gay romance stories, with women leading the fandom
items.title_zh: 激烈竞争推动同性恋浪漫故事热潮
items.summary: 今年假期到来，Margaret Hecox的祖母喜欢这部热议的电视剧《激烈对抗》，带动粉丝兴趣激增。数据显示，TikTok上#fujoshi标签视频超过90万，Google搜索量激增，显示同性恋题材在美国市场的快速普及。行业专家指出，这些内容正在走向主流，尤其吸引直性女性观众。
important_points: 女性主导粉丝群体，推动内容传播
TikTok视频量大，搜索量飙升
主流媒体关注度提升，市场影响深远

items.title: Trading in these two ETFs suggests inflation fears are overblown
items.title_zh: 交易这两只ETF，通胀担忧过度
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：It could have been a big week for bond bears, if it weren't for crude oil.；US GDP came in above expectations and the Fed's preferred inflation gauge printed the highest reading since October 2023.；Yet U.S.
important_points: It could have been a big week for bond bears, if it weren't for crude oil.
US GDP came in above expectations and the Fed's preferred inflation gauge printed the highest reading since October 2023.

items.title: Bloom Energy: Why The 22% Plunge Was Mechanical, Not Fundamental. Reiterate Buy (NYSE:BE)
items.title_zh: Bloom Energy：22%暴跌原因是机械性卖压，非基本面
items.summary: 分析显示，Bloom Energy股价下跌28%，主要受市场重新构建的机械性卖压影响。公司报告Q1非GAAP利润为0.44，收入同比增长130%，未来收入预期为34%。管理层调整了2026年收入目标，毛利率34%，运营利润600-750百万美元，操作杠杆强劲。技术支持在215-230之间，尽管波动大，仍具备吸引买入机会。
important_points: 机械性卖压导致股价大幅下跌
收入和毛利率显著提升，预期收入增长
操作杠杆强，财务表现稳健
技术支持位居合理位

items.title: STMicroelectronics Stock: Real Transformation, But Wait For The Pullback (NYSE:STM)
items.title_zh: STMicroelectronics股价：转型推进，但需等回升
items.summary: 文章分析了芯片行业战略转型的现实进程，指出当前估值反映了市场对AI计算转型的长期预期。数据显示公司战略调整进展缓慢，投资者需关注回调可能性。分析认为短期波动可能影响表现，但长期潜力依然存在。
important_points: 芯片行业转型周期较长，未能及时实现预期收益。
当前估值已体现市场对长期AI计算转型的认可。
公司未披露持有相关股票，避免潜在利益冲突。
市场需关注回调动向，影响短期表现。

items.title: SpaceX to join the Nasdaq-100 in a fast-tracked process that will drive huge ETF buying demand
items.title_zh: SpaceX加入纳斯达克100指数，推动大规模ETF购买
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：SpaceX became one of the quickest additions ever to the Nasdaq-100 index, setting up a fresh wave of buying from passive investors less than a month after the company's blockbuster public debut.；Nasdaq announced after the close Friday that SpaceX qualifies for inclusion in the benchmark technology index.；Assuming the company meets the requirements, index-tracking funds and other product sponsors would begin purchasing shares after the market closes on July 6, with SpaceX officially joining the Nasdaq-100 before trading begins on July 7.
important_points: SpaceX became one of the quickest additions ever to the Nasdaq-100 index, setting up a fresh wave of buying from passive investors less than a month after the company's blockbuster public debut.
Nasdaq announced after the close Friday that SpaceX qualifies for inclusion in the benchmark technology index.

Assuming the company meets the requirements, index-tracking funds and other product sponsors would begin purchasing shares after the market closes on July 6, with SpaceX officially joining the Nasdaq-100 before trading begins on July 7.

items.title: 李迅雷：“硅基时代”加剧K型分化，三大指标考验AI泡沫
items.title_zh: 李迅雷：“硅基时代”加剧K型分化，三大指标考验AI泡沫
items.summary: 未调用大模型，以下为原文关键信息摘录：{{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 K型，是当前描述宏观经济和股票市场最具共识的定语。；“今年K型分化表现更为明显，”在中泰金融国际有限公司首席经济学家李迅雷看来，AI发展带来的“硅基时代”会进一步加剧K型分化，在此背景下资本市场风险与机会并存。；6月26日，在第一财经举办“数智赋能 价值共生”2026证券基金业财富管理生态论坛上，李迅雷对当前经济和市场K型分化的原因进行了深入剖析，同时他提出，可以通过现金流、失业率和通胀水平来观察AI泡沫是否会破灭。
important_points: {{aisd}} AI生成 免责声明 K型，是当前描述宏观经济和股票市场最具共识的定语。
“今年K型分化表现更为明显，”在中泰金融国际有限公司首席经济学家李迅雷看来，AI发展带来的“硅基时代”会进一步加剧K型分化，在此背景下资本市场风险与机会并存。
6月26日，在第一财经举办“数智赋能 价值共生”2026证券基金业财富管理生态论坛上，李迅雷对当前经济和市场K型分化的原因进行了深入剖析，同时他提出，可以通过现金流、失业率和通胀水平来观察AI泡沫是否会破灭。
